---
title: "Team"
---

```{r}
library(lubridate)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

source("R/data.R")
d <- seec_read_data()

updated <- with_tz(Sys.time(), "Africa/Johannesburg")
```

**Last updated:** `r format(updated, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")`

```{r}
DT::datatable(
  d$coreteam,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel"),
    pageLength = 25,
    scrollX = TRUE
  )
)
```
